name: Unauthorized Admin Change
description: Detects calls to change the administrative control of a contract, which could indicate a hostile takeover if unverified.
monitoring_recommendations: Monitor the source account of the transaction and verify it matches the current recognized administrator. Trigger immediate alerts if it deviates.

name: Vault Liquidity Drain
description: Sudden large-scale asset transfer from a recognized vault or treasury contract. May indicate a rug pull or an exploit draining the funds.
monitoring_recommendations: Set thresholds based on typical transaction volumes. Trigger a 'circuit breaker' or emergency pause if a transfer exceeds 15% of total liquidity within a block.

name: Unexpected Contract Upgrade
description: Monitors for logic changes in the contract via Wasm updates. Malicious upgrades can introduce backdoors or redirect funds.
monitoring_recommendations: Ensure that the upgrade transaction originates from a timelock or multisig. If it's a sudden, single-signer upgrade, flag it as highly suspicious.

name: Emergency Pause Triggered
description: Detects when the emergency pause functionality is invoked on a contract.
monitoring_recommendations: Alert stakeholders to investigate the cause of the pause. It is a sign that anomalous behavior has already been observed or a known vulnerability is being mitigated.

name: High-Frequency Token Minting
description: Repeated or unusually large minting operations in a short time span. Often an indicator of infinite mint exploits.
monitoring_recommendations: Cross-check minting operations against expected issuance schedules. Alert on bursts of minting transactions.
